// ../entrypoints/index.ts
import policyText from "./0fbcb3a47a6103fbcc4250cb4441e33f2b6f36d4-token-policy.rules.json";
var index_default = {
  fetch() {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      constructor: policyText.constructor.name,
      parsed: JSON.parse(policyText),
      text: policyText,
      type: typeof policyText
    }));
  }
};
export {
  index_default as default
};
//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map

[252] assistant: A narrow glob relative to the deploy-owned entrypoint path works: `../config/*.rules.json` matched the policy file and still emitted it as a separate module. I’m doing one control run without a rule to see what Wrangler/esbuild would do with a JSON import by default.
